    "No equipment grounding conductor connected to receptacle grounding terminal",
    "Grounding path is incomplete, creating shock hazard"

    "Verify grounding conductor is present and properly bonded at panel",

  ],
  "rationale": "An open ground condition at a receptacle is a code violation (NEC 406.4) and a safety hazard, as it prevents fault current from clearing, increasing risk of electric shock. The work is roughed in but must be corrected before close-out.",

    "NEC 406.9"
